target.title: fix(doctor): report runtime tool schema validation errors
target.body:
## Summary

- Converts doctor runtime tool-schema validation failures into actionable health findings instead of letting the check abort.
- Covers agent tool construction failures, provider/plugin schema normalization failures, and bundled MCP schema normalization failures while preserving MCP runtime cleanup.
- Keeps this as the doctor/reporting companion to the runtime quarantine work, not a broader policy or trusted-plugin semantics change.

## Verification

- Rebased branch onto current `origin/main`; pushed head `0773aa1019d440652288b20b85f7009e9367e00d`.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime-errors.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=verbose`: passed, 2 routed shards / 46 tests.
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime-errors.test.ts`: passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime-errors.test.ts`: passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`: passed.
- `node scripts/changed-lanes.mjs --json`: selected only `core` and `coreTests` for the two doctor files.
- `node scripts/check-changed.mjs --dry-run`: selected only `core` and `coreTests` for the two doctor files.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings.
- Touched-file scrub found only neutral `fuzzplugin` fixture names and no reported private plugin/tool name.
- GitHub CI note: `checks-node-core-runtime-infra-outbound-actions` is failing in `src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.core-send.test.ts`, outside this PR's diff. I reproduced that same failing file locally from the current main-derived worktree; this is a current-main blocker, not a doctor change failure. PR #88673 is the separate one-file test update for that blocker and now has pass/skipped-only checks, but it is not yet on `origin/main`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `openclaw doctor` runtime tool-schema health checks now report tool loading and schema normalization failures as doctor findings instead of aborting the schema validation check.

Real environment tested: local linked gwt worktree using the repo Vitest router for the touched doctor health-check surface.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime-errors.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=verbose`; `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime-errors.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime-errors.test.ts`; `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`; `node scripts/changed-lanes.mjs --json`; `node scripts/check-changed.mjs --dry-run`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.core-send.test.ts --reporter=verbose` to prove the unrelated current-main CI failure boundary.

Evidence after fix: simulated `fuzzplugin` tool construction, agent schema normalization, and bundled MCP schema normalization failures all return `core/doctor/runtime-tool-schemas` health findings and do not stop doctor from continuing its runtime schema pass.

Observed result after fix: focused doctor tests, formatting, lint, diff check, lane dry-run, and autoreview passed after the latest rebase/push.

What was not tested: no clean broad `pnpm check:changed` run after the rebase; current GitHub CI is red from an unrelated outbound-routing test on current main, tracked separately in PR #88673.
target.author: vincentkoc
